title: Logo usage rights
description: Permission to use the customer’s official logo on A-SAFE website, proposals, case studies, and brochures to showcase partnership.

title: Written case study
description: Customer agrees to participate in a professionally produced case study article including project details, quotes, and outcomes.

title: Video testimonial
description: Customer provides a short filmed testimonial with their HSE or Operations lead, describing the value of A-SAFE barriers and impact protection.

title: On-site photography
description: Permission for A-SAFE to professionally photograph installed barriers in operation at the customer’s facility for marketing use.

title: Reference site access
description: Customer allows their facility to be used as a live reference site for tours by prospective A-SAFE clients.

title: Official LinkedIn post
description: Customer agrees to publish a post on their corporate LinkedIn page highlighting the A-SAFE installation, tagging A-SAFE Middle East.

title: Joint press release
description: A co-branded press release is issued in collaboration with the customer’s communications team to promote the project’s success.

title: Warm referrals
description: Customer provides 2–3 warm introductions to peer companies, subsidiaries, or industry partners who may benefit from A-SAFE solutions.

title: Multi-year service agreement
description: Customer signs a multi-year aftersales service/maintenance package agreement with A-SAFE.

title: Exclusive supplier agreement
description: Customer agrees A-SAFE will be the exclusive supplier of impact protection solutions for a defined period of time.

title: Flagship safety showcase
description: Customer allows their project to be promoted as a flagship benchmark site for A-SAFE in the region, featured in marketing and presentations.
